title: Create: Configureables
description: Allows you to configure anything that has recipe conflicts!
body:
# Create: Configureables

Allows you to configure anything that doesnt have a recipe filter!

- Best used for massive modpacks
- Easy to use ( Just right click Millstone, or Center of Crushing wheels )
- Compatible with Create 6.0!
- Works with Create Aeronautics! (and Sable as well)

## How to use
Install the mod and right click on either the Center of the Crushing Wheels or Millstones!
( A blue highlight will display to show its configureable! )

## Suggestions
Please open an issue on github for any suggestions for anything that needs Recipe Filters!
